item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
The "log someone out" string used to be a real thing that you could do, at least for users using specific types of modems for dial-up. Wikipedia describes it better than I can: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Time_Independent_Escape_Sequence#TIES
On IRC, I've heard of it being used with CTCP ping instead of ICMP.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I thought this was SO funny! Especially when the two people started repeatedly sending each other SCP-3116 and making them log out! +1!

item.title: if i dont upvote this im gonna SHIT
item.content:encoded: this legit got a laugh out of me 1+

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
lmao yes

Glorious internet.
Reveal yourself!

gaycopmp4: also make sure not to use it for evil or anything
CommunismAnarchismNihilism: loud and clear
CommunismAnarchismNihilism: [SCP-3116 REMOVED]
gaycopmp4 logged out.
gaycopmp4 logged in.
gaycopmp4: why you little
gaycopmp4: [SCP-3116 REMOVED]
CommunismAnarchismNihilism logged out.
CommunismAnarchismNihilism logged in.
CommunismAnarchismNihilism: [SCP-3116 REMOVED]
gaycopmp4 logged out.
gaycopmp4 logged in.
gaycopmp4: [SCP-3116 REMOVED]
CommunismAnarchismNihilism logged out.
CommunismAnarchismNihilism logged in.
CommunismAnarchismNihilism: [SCP-3116 REMOVED]
gaycopmp4 logged out.
gaycopmp4 logged in.
gaycopmp4: [SCP-3116 REMOVED]
CommunismAnarchismNihilism logged out.
CommunismAnarchismNihilism logged in.

[REDACTED FOR BREVITY]

Yes. Just, yes.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I feel like the only appropriate response is that Bill O'Reilly clip with the two hip-hop artists singing "u mad".

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Would like to request this iteration of my post be deleted. Wikidot and my internet connection had an unfortunate interaction and sent my post twice. Very embarrassing.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: This is the cutest SCP I've read since 3900. I don't mean to slight anybody else who did well; I don't read most articles but… gosh this just really made me happy to read? It's really really charming. My day is better than it was before I read this.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I'd like to thank you all for helping me make far-right losers mad online.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Logs were very enjoyable, although I didn't really get the transition from (removed) talking about the proposal being ruined to gaycopmp4 talking about the hallucination side effect (although her explanation was great). I don't see the relation.

Also, "horny on main" is pretty anachronistic as a meme here, which I know doesn't really matter but bugged me anyway.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: +1 for bones trying to help unravel the mystery. bones is my favorite part of GAW.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I liked it enough for an upvote, but I agree that more could have been done with the logs.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
+1

I liked the anomaly itself, actually, mostly because I thought the unintended consequences were well-thought out.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Admittedly, I was going to downvote. It seems more like an excuse for GAW trademarks to have at it with a typical GAW scenario. Perhaps a bit more real-world consequences would help, since it seems like the Foundation got this directly from GAW without the string leaking worldwide.

As it is, though, the final message (especially "p.s. she said yes") made me change it to a novote for sheer power of cute. I would recommend adding some log where some major streamer had all of his viewers logged out of twitch, someone decided to create a bot to spam r/socialjustice with it, rendering all mods powerless to stop him, or a similar shenanigan.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Site search confirms this is the first use of the phrase "horny on main" in a SCP. Truly historic.

…Anyway, this is pretty funny and cute. +1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: The anomaly itself is mildly cute - but I prefer the more character-focused GAW articles, and this one doesn't provide anything more than a cheap laugh or two.

item.title: Gamer's Against Weed is back baby. It's good again. Awoouu (wolf Howl)
item.content:encoded:
Thanks to everyone who reviewed this in chat!

Mood music: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=a5sPxuf4tDY
